title: eucalyptus maculata var. citriodora
intro: Eucalyptus maculata var. citriodora, commonly known as Lemon-scented Gum or Lemon-scented Mallee, is a variety of eucalyptus tree native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains citronellal and eucalyptol, offering anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eucalyptus maculata var. citriodora include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe sore muscles and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
